name: claudeos-handoff
description: ClaudeOS Handoff - end-of-session handoff for cold-start continuity. Auto-surfaces the nearest HANDOFF.md into cold/resumed sessions and backs up the transcript before compaction (Claude Code + Cowork), and regenerates a per-project HANDOFF.md via /handoff: reconciles docs, writes a cross-system wiring map, syncs memory if configured, and PROPOSES (never auto-runs) data/state cleanup.
